title: Bread Skin MITE
description: Display saturation on your MITEmod screen
body:
# Bread Skin
## En
* For FishModLoader3.2.2 and MITE(Minecraft is Too Easy)
* Display saturation on your MITEmod screen
* Download FishModLoader & ManyLib in [here](https://pan.huang1111.cn/s/7E84ug)(password: mite)
## 中文
* 适用于FishModLoader3.2.2以及MITE(Minecraft is Too Easy)
* 可以在你的MITE游戏界面上显示饱和度
* 在[这里](https://pan.huang1111.cn/s/7E84ug)(密码: mite)下载FishModLoader以及ManyLib
